review_scope.focus: Re-review of repaired blockers F001-F002 and direct integration in the repaired source surface
validation_commands: host-side probe of motion_supervisor.cpp stop-entry decay

summary: F001 repaired: SIGTERM now provides a bounded forced-exit path, and the smoke wrapper escalates timeout handling instead of waiting indefinitely on a latched fail-safe runtime.
F002 repaired: STOPPING now decays from the prior effective speed target instead of reusing full running target on the stop-entry cycle.
Validation rerun passed: configure, build, shell syntax check, and scoped local smoke command all completed successfully.
review_coverage.notes: The local smoke command completed with the expected architecture-skip fallback on this x86_64 host because /home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/out/new is a LoongArch binary. No remaining materially independent findings were identified in the scoped repaired surface.
